   - **Payment**: Pending (soft yellow), Completed (success green), Failed (danger red), Refunded (gray-indigo).

+---
+
+## Mobile Devotee App Bookings Tracker UI/UX Overhaul
+
+We have completely overhauled the **My Bookings** tracking tracker view inside `/Users/sahilpatel/Desktop/New_Mantra_puja.nosync/APP/mantrapuja/app/settings_detail.tsx` to fix critical styling oversights, spelling errors, and hardcoded items shown in the user's recorded screen:
+
+### 1. Extinguished "Gotra Chanting & Chanting" Redundancy
+- **Spelling Polish**: Eliminated the redundant "Chanting & Chanting" text in Step 3 of the Puja Ritual Milestones progress tracker, changing it to the highly professional **"Gotra Chanting & Puja Performance"**.
+- **Cohesive Language Context Integration**: Embedded a secure, modular dictionary mapping this new step description across all **7 ancestral languages** supported by the application:
+  - **English**: Gotra Chanting & Puja Performance
+  - **Hindi**: गोत्रोच्चारण एवं पूजा अनुष्ठान
+  - **Sanskrit**: गोत्रोच्चारणं पूजा-अनुष्ठानं च
+  - **Gujarati**: ગોત્ર ઉચ્ચારણ અને પૂજા વિધિ
+  - **Marathi**: गोत्रोच्चार आणि पूजा विधी
+  - **Tamil**: கோத்திரம் உச்சரிப்பு மற்றும் பூஜை சடங்கு
+  - **Telugu**: గోత్ర జపం & పూజా విధానం
+
+### 2. Dynamic Temple Association & Verification
+- **Eradicated Hardcoded Labels**: Resolved the static temple text where all active and completed pujas were forced to display the Ganges bank in Varanasi (`t('Kashi Vishwanath Mandir bank, Varanasi')`).
+- **Dynamic Resolving System**: Created a smart resolver utility `getBookingTempleName()` mapping local mock IDs to their respective consecrated locations (e.g. Siddhi Vinayak Mandir for Ganesh Puja, Kedarnath Temple for Kedarnath Puja, Tirupati Balaji Mandir for Tirupati Puja, etc.).
+- **Parallel Database Pre-Fetching**: Configured `settings_detail.tsx` to query the `website_pooja_products` table and cache the `temple_association` values in parallel with order fetches using `Promise.all()`. Dynamic pujas created by the administrator in the backend will automatically pull and display their exact, custom temple associations!
+
+### 3. Build & Compilation Verification
+- **TypeScript Static Verification**: Re-verified the entire mobile codebase using `npx tsc --noEmit`. Compiles and passes with **zero warnings or type-mismatch errors**.
+- **Realtime sync verification**: Verified that both the admin panel status dropdowns and the user's mobile booking milestones stepper sync seamlessly in real-time.
+
+
 
[diff_block_end]

Please note that the above snippet only shows the MODIFIED lines from the last change. It shows up to 3 lines of unchanged lines before and after the modified lines. The actual file contents may have many more lines not shown.
